zh.Of Flamborough, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾福藍波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marmaduke Constable I於大約1275年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾福藍波洛時，他的父親Robert Constable26歲，母親Katherine de Mauley21歲。他和Elizabeth至少有2個兒子。他去世於1378年6月19日之前在英國越可爾福藍波洛，埋葬在英國越可爾福藍波洛。

zh-hans.Of Flamborough, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾福藍波洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marmaduke Constable I于大约1275年出生在英国英格兰越可爾福藍波洛时，他的父亲Robert Constable26岁，母亲Katherine de Mauley21岁。他和Elizabeth至少有2个儿子。他去世于1378年6月19日之前在英国越可爾福藍波洛，埋葬在英国越可爾福藍波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Marmaduke Constable I was born about 1275, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Constable, was 26 and his mother, Katherine de Mauley, was 21. He had at least 2 sons with Elizabeth. He died before 19 June 1378, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marmaduke Constable I est né environ 1275, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Constable, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Mauley, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Elizabeth. Il est décédé avant 19 juin 1378, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marmaduke Constable I um 1275 in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Constable 26 und seine Mutter Katherine de Mauley 21. Er hatte mit Elizabeth mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 19. Juni 1378 in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marmaduke Constable I è nato il circa 1275 nel Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Constable, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Mauley, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Elizabeth. Morì prima del 19 giugno 1378, nel Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolto a Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Of Flamborough, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Marmaduke Constable Iが約1275年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウで生まれた時，父Robert Constableは26歳，母Katherine de Mauleyは21歳であった。彼はElizabethとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1378年6月19日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marmaduke Constable I(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플램루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Constable(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Mauley(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Elizabeth(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1378년 6월 19일 이전 영국 요르크실르 플램루에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 플램루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marmaduke Constable I nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Constable, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Mauley, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Elizabeth. Ele faleceu antes 19 de junho de 1378, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marmaduke Constable I родился около 1275 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Constable было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Mauley, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Elizabeth. Он умер перед 19 июнь 1378 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marmaduke Constable I nació aproximadamente 1275, en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Constable, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Katherine de Mauley, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Elizabeth. Murió antes de 19 de junio de 1378, en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
